summary: Public files, concept routes, issue routes, paper index, digest, roadmap, IndexNow route, partial public search-result visibility, priority Zenodo metadata backlinks, and user-reported Google Search Console sitemap / URL inspection requests are in place. Bing Webmaster receipts, public Google indexing evidence, and historical Zenodo backfill still require evidence before they can be marked complete.

items.evidence: Main sitemap, llms, robots, canonical tags, concept routes, paper index, and IndexNow key are generated and checked by local public-route validation.
items.proof_condition: Continued public validity is evidenced by dated HTTP 200 checks and public-route validation.

items.evidence: HF sitemap, llms, canonical tags, concept routes, paper index route, paper cards, and IndexNow key are generated and checked by local public-route validation.
items.proof_condition: Continued HF mirror validity is evidenced by dated HTTP 200 checks and public-route validation; note that Hugging Face may override root robots behavior on the static host.

items.evidence: README links main site, GitHub source, GitHub issues, HF mirror, HF Space repository, Zenodo portfolio, llms.txt, sitemap, search discovery, and completion audit.
items.proof_condition: Public README continues to expose the same cross-link chain after each release.

items.evidence: HF Space README links main site, GitHub source, GitHub issues, HF repository, Zenodo portfolio, llms.txt, sitemap, concepts, papers, and completion audit.
items.proof_condition: HF repository README remains aligned with the live static mirror.

items.evidence: Seven priority Zenodo records were verified through the public Zenodo API on 2026-06-15. Each verified record exposes website, GitHub, HF/static HF backlinks and four related-work entries. The broader 51-record patch pack still includes 44 historical records that have not yet been account-applied.
items.proof_condition: Priority records remain complete while their public Zenodo landing pages or API metadata expose mianzhang.org, github.com/mmjbds/mianzhang.org, and Hugging Face/static HF links. Historical records should be backfilled separately before claiming full-archive completion.

items.evidence: Concept pages define No-Proof No-Action Gate, Self-Certification Grounding Check, Proof-Carrying Action, WisdomBench, Robot/Vision Downgrade Rule, and The Grounding Canon with definition, scope, links, counterexample route, and boundary.
items.proof_condition: Keep all concept pages in sitemap, llms.txt, and public challenge routes.

items.evidence: User reported on 2026-06-15 that the mianzhang.org Google Search Console domain property passed verification, the sitemap submission flow was completed, and priority URLs were inspected / requested for indexing. This status records account-side action; it does not claim Google indexing, ranking, or AI retrieval.
items.proof_condition: Keep this status separate from indexing evidence. Mark Google indexing complete only after a dated Search Console indexed-status export, URL inspection screenshot, or public Google result URL is recorded.

items.evidence: Sitemap, IndexNow key, and URL lists are public; no dated Bing Webmaster receipt is recorded in the public ledger.
items.proof_condition: Add a dated Bing Webmaster sitemap receipt, crawl status, or URL inspection receipt before claiming account-console submission.

items.evidence: IndexNow API returned HTTP 200 for the current 69-URL host-specific lists on 2026-06-15, after the machine-readable search report route was added.
items.proof_condition: IndexNow status applies only to the recorded URL list and dated API response; later route additions require separate evidence.

items.item: site: and exact-term search weekly report
items.evidence: Weekly report records confirmed public result URLs for the main site and HF mirror in both HTML and machine-readable JSON while keeping exact concept-entry coverage, console receipts, and AI retrieval unclaimed.
items.proof_condition: Record direct result URLs, screenshots, or console exports before claiming indexing or model retrieval.

items.evidence: Templates exist for claim challenge, counterexample, reproduction failure, evidence gap, baseline challenge, documentation boundary, and security boundary.
items.proof_condition: Keep templates narrow, public-only, and linked from community and contribution routes.

items.evidence: The contribution guide states how to challenge claims, report reproduction failures, identify evidence gaps, propose baselines, and avoid restricted material.
items.proof_condition: Keep contribution instructions aligned with live issue templates and public boundary rules.

items.evidence: The public paper index maps 51 registry rows to DOI, GitHub card, HF card, evidence level, and current public status.
items.proof_condition: Regenerate index when new DOI records, evidence grades, or public status labels change.

items.evidence: Weekly digest records added, corrected, downgraded, and still-unproven public claim classes.
items.proof_condition: Keep future digests dated and tied to concrete public routes.

items.evidence: Roadmap separates archived, candidate, restricted, and never-publish material classes without exposing restricted details.
items.proof_condition: Update roadmap when paper classes or disclosure boundaries change.

zenodo_priority_records_verified.label: F2/P-AE/D3 / No Act Without Proof artifacts
